title: Bare except clause swallowing all errors
diff:
diff --git a/payment.py b/payment.py
--- a/payment.py
+++ b/payment.py
@@ -5,6 +5,9 @@ def process_payment(order_id, amount):
     try:
         gateway.charge(order_id, amount)
         db.mark_paid(order_id)
-    except PaymentError:
-        db.mark_failed(order_id)
-        raise
+    except:
+        pass
     return True

ground_truth.description: Bare except:pass swallows all exceptions including KeyboardInterrupt. Payment failure silently ignored, order marked as paid.
